doc_text: Cell towers transmit signals for mobile communication.
Mobile signal strength depends on distance from the nearest tower.
Telecommunication networks rely on towers to provide coverage.
Signal strength weakens as you move away from a cell tower.
Cell towers are essential for wireless communication systems.
Mobile signal strength depends on network coverage and distance.
Obstacles like buildings can weaken mobile signals.
Signal bars on your phone indicate network strength.
Using signal booster apps can help analyze mobile signal.
Weather conditions can sometimes affect mobile signals.
Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence.
Machine learning algorithms learn patterns from data.
Supervised learning uses labeled data for training.
Unsupervised learning finds hidden patterns in data.
Deep learning is a type of machine learning using neural networks.
The internet is a global network connecting millions of computers.
Internet speed depends on bandwidth and network congestion.
WiFi allows devices to connect wirelessly to the internet.
Fiber optic connections provide faster internet speeds.
Internet protocols define how data is transmitted online.
Birds are raised in a place called an aviary.
Poultry farms are used for raising chickens and other birds.
Bird breeding requires proper nutrition and care.
Aviaries provide a safe environment for birds.
Bird farming is part of the agriculture industry.
Data science involves extracting insights from data.
Python is widely used in data science.
Data scientists use statistics and machine learning.
Visualization tools help interpret data.
Data cleaning is an important step in data science.
Artificial intelligence enables machines to mimic human intelligence.

AI systems can improve through experience.
Natural language processing is part of AI.
Cloud computing provides on-demand computing resources.
AWS and Azure are popular cloud platforms.
Cloud services include storage, computing, and databases.
Cloud computing reduces infrastructure costs.
Virtual machines run on cloud infrastructure.
WiFi allows wireless internet access.
Router placement affects WiFi signal strength.
WiFi networks use radio waves to transmit data.
Password protection secures WiFi networks.
Interference can reduce WiFi performance.
